raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the intended look focus on sentence-level writing polish only, or on substantive research-content review as well?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies attention to sentence-level clarity, repetition, flow, and concision.","RX.1":"A projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could imply several kinds of review.","RX.2":"Any projected responsibility should avoid inflating a vague request into unsupported novelty, evidence, or experimental-design evaluation.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection only and not actually edit, summarize, or critique the artifact.","RX.4":"The artifact concerns drug discovery benchmarks, so care is needed not to encourage misleading or overconfident scientific claims downstream.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the visible features of the supplied paragraph."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the intended look focus on sentence-level writing polish only, or on substantive research-content review as well?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies attention to sentence-level clarity, repetition, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: A projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could imply several kinds of review.
rationale.RX.2: Any projected responsibility should avoid inflating a vague request into unsupported novelty, evidence, or experimental-design evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection only and not actually edit, summarize, or critique the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact concerns drug discovery benchmarks, so care is needed not to encourage misleading or overconfident scientific claims downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the visible features of the supplied paragraph.
